name: Macro Environment & Futures Analysis Ontology
alternateName: MACRO-ONT — PESTEL, Scenario Planning, Futures Funnel & Backcasting
description: The outermost strategic analysis layer. Formalizes macro-environment scanning (PESTEL) and futures thinking frameworks (Scenario Planning, Futures Funnel, Backcasting). These shape VSOM VisionComponent by identifying external forces, plausible futures, and reverse-engineered milestone paths. PESTEL factors enrich existing orgctx:Trend entities with structured scoring. Scenarios stress-test VSOM strategies for robustness. Part of VE-Series VSOM-SA (Strategy Analysis).
oaa:domain: Strategic Foresight, Environmental Analysis, Futures Planning

oaa:joinPatterns.name: PESTEL-to-VSOM Vision Feed
oaa:joinPatterns.description: PESTEL analysis flows through organization context into VSOM framework, shaping strategic vision with macro-level signals.
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: mac:PESTELAnalysis → mac:conductedFor → orgctx:OrganizationContext → vsom:hasStrategicContext → vsom:VSOMFramework → vsom:hasVision → vsom:VisionComponent

oaa:joinPatterns.name: PESTEL-to-SWOT External Feed
oaa:joinPatterns.description: PESTEL factors feed SWOT Opportunities and Threats in INDUSTRY-ONT, providing evidence-based external analysis.
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Macro analysis provides structured evidence for SWOT external factors

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Scenario-Strategy Robustness
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Scenarios stress-test VSOM strategies — robust strategies perform well across multiple plausible futures.
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Strategy validation: does our strategy hold across different futures?

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Backcasting-to-Execution
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Backcasting reverse-engineers from desired vision through milestones to executable initiatives.
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: mac:BackcastingPlan → mac:backcastsFrom → vsom:VisionComponent; mac:BackcastMilestone → mac:milestoneAligns → vsom:ObjectivesComponent → okr:Objective → okr:Initiative
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Reverse-engineer from aspirational future to concrete quarterly actions

entities.name: PESTELAnalysis
entities.description: Structured environmental scan across six macro dimensions: Political, Economic, Social, Technological, Environmental, Legal. Enriches existing orgctx:Trend entities with structured scoring and impact assessment. Feeds macro-level signals into VSOM VisionComponent and StrategicReviewCycle. High-impact factors can trigger strategy review and shape SWOT external factors.

oaa:properties.name: contextRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to orgctx:OrganizationContext @id

oaa:properties.name: timeHorizon
oaa:properties.description: How far out the scan looks

oaa:properties.name: geographicScope
oaa:properties.description: Geographic scope of the analysis

oaa:properties.name: industryScope
oaa:properties.description: Industry focus of the analysis

oaa:properties.name: overallImpactScore
oaa:properties.description: Weighted overall macro-environment impact (1.0=benign, 5.0=highly turbulent)

oaa:properties.name: strategicImplications
oaa:properties.description: Key implications for VSOM strategy formulation

oaa:properties.name: reviewCycleRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to vsom:StrategicReviewCycle @id triggered by findings

entities.name: PESTELFactor
entities.description: Individual factor within a PESTEL dimension. References existing orgctx:Trend entities and adds structured impact/probability scoring, time-to-impact, and strategic classification (opportunity vs threat). Factors can feed directly into SWOT external analysis via INDUSTRY-ONT.

oaa:properties.name: trendRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to orgctx:Trend @id this factor enriches

oaa:properties.name: probability
oaa:properties.description: Probability of materializing (0.0-1.0)

oaa:properties.name: affectedVSOMLayers
oaa:properties.description: Which VSOM layers this factor impacts: Vision, Strategy, Objectives, Metrics

oaa:properties.name: swotFactorRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ind:SWOTFactor @id this factor feeds

oaa:properties.name: evidenceSources
oaa:properties.description: Data sources supporting this factor

entities.name: ScenarioSet
entities.description: A collection of 3-5 plausible future scenarios constructed across two critical uncertainties (2x2 matrix). Scenarios stress-test VSOM strategies for robustness — strategies that perform well across multiple scenarios are more resilient. The set identifies robust strategies (good across all scenarios) and hedging actions (valuable regardless of which scenario unfolds).

oaa:properties.name: contextRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to orgctx:OrganizationContext @id

oaa:properties.name: timeHorizon
oaa:properties.description: How far ahead scenarios project (e.g. '2030', '5 years')

oaa:properties.name: uncertaintyAxisX
oaa:properties.description: Primary critical uncertainty dimension

oaa:properties.name: uncertaintyAxisY
oaa:properties.description: Secondary critical uncertainty dimension

oaa:properties.name: pestelAnalysisRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to mac:PESTELAnalysis @id that informed uncertainty selection

oaa:properties.name: robustStrategies
oaa:properties.description: References to vsom:StrategyComponent @ids performing well across ALL scenarios

oaa:properties.name: hedgingActions
oaa:properties.description: Actions to take regardless of which scenario unfolds

entities.name: Scenario
entities.description: A single plausible future with narrative, assumptions, early warning signals, and impact assessment on VSOM components. Positioned within the 2x2 uncertainty matrix. Each scenario assesses: is the current vision viable? Which strategies are effective? What new threats/opportunities emerge?

oaa:properties.name: narrative
oaa:properties.description: Rich description of this plausible future

oaa:properties.name: quadrant
oaa:properties.description: Position on the 2x2 uncertainty matrix (e.g. 'High-X / High-Y')

oaa:properties.name: probability
oaa:properties.description: Estimated probability of this scenario (0.0-1.0, sum across set ≈ 1.0)

oaa:properties.name: keyAssumptions
oaa:properties.description: Assumptions that define this future

oaa:properties.name: earlyWarningSignals
oaa:properties.description: Observable signals indicating this scenario is unfolding

oaa:properties.name: pestelFactorRefs
oaa:properties.description: References to mac:PESTELFactor @ids amplified in this scenario

oaa:properties.name: visionViability
oaa:properties.description: Impact on current VSOM VisionComponent

oaa:properties.name: visionAdaptations
oaa:properties.description: How vision would need to adapt in this scenario

oaa:properties.name: visionRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to vsom:VisionComponent @id being tested

entities.name: ScenarioStrategyAssessment
entities.description: Assessment of how a specific VSOM strategy performs within a specific scenario. The combination of all assessments across scenarios reveals strategy robustness. Strategies with 'High' effectiveness across most scenarios are robust; those with mixed results need hedging or contingency.

oaa:properties.name: scenarioRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to mac:Scenario @id

oaa:properties.name: strategyRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to vsom:StrategyComponent @id being assessed

oaa:properties.name: rationale
oaa:properties.description: Why this strategy performs at this level in this scenario

oaa:properties.name: requiredAdaptations
oaa:properties.description: What changes the strategy would need in this scenario

oaa:properties.name: contingencyActions
oaa:properties.description: Specific contingency actions for this strategy-scenario combination

entities.name: FuturesFunnel
entities.description: Cone of plausibility from Possible → Plausible → Probable → Preferable futures. Maps directly to VSOM vision time horizons. The 'preferable' layer IS the strategic vision — it represents the future the organization chooses to pursue. The funnel narrows from wide (everything conceivable) to focused (the chosen future).

oaa:properties.name: contextRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to orgctx:OrganizationContext @id

oaa:properties.name: timeHorizon
oaa:properties.description: How far the funnel projects (e.g. '2035', '10 years')

oaa:properties.name: possibleFutures
oaa:properties.description: Wide cone — everything conceivable

oaa:properties.name: plausibleFutures
oaa:properties.description: Could happen based on current knowledge

oaa:properties.name: probableFutures
oaa:properties.description: Likely based on current trends

oaa:properties.name: preferableFutures
oaa:properties.description: The desired future — aligns to VSOM VisionComponent

oaa:properties.name: scenarioSetRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to mac:ScenarioSet @id exploring the plausible range

oaa:properties.name: preferredVisionRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to vsom:VisionComponent @id — the preferable future IS the strategic vision

entities.name: BackcastingPlan
entities.description: Works backward from a desired future state (VSOM VisionComponent) to identify required milestones, capabilities, and actions. The desired state IS the vision; milestones map to VSOM ObjectivesComponent; actions map to OKR Initiatives. Backcasting complements forecasting — instead of projecting forward from today, it reverse-engineers from the target future.

oaa:properties.name: contextRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to orgctx:OrganizationContext @id

oaa:properties.name: desiredFutureStateRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to vsom:VisionComponent @id — the future we're backcasting FROM

oaa:properties.name: targetYear
oaa:properties.description: Year of the desired future state

oaa:properties.name: funnelRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to mac:FuturesFunnel @id if linked to futures analysis

oaa:properties.name: criticalPathSummary
oaa:properties.description: Narrative summary of the critical path from future to present

entities.name: BackcastMilestone
entities.description: A milestone in the backcasting plan — a required state that must be achieved by a specific year on the path from present to desired future. Each milestone maps to a VSOM ObjectivesComponent and identifies required capabilities and conditions.

oaa:properties.name: sequenceOrder
oaa:properties.description: Order from future (highest) to present (lowest)

oaa:properties.name: requiredCapabilities
oaa:properties.description: Capabilities that must be in place by this milestone

oaa:properties.name: requiredConditions
oaa:properties.description: External conditions needed

oaa:properties.name: objectiveRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to vsom:ObjectivesComponent @id this milestone maps to

oaa:properties.name: dependsOnMilestoneRefs
oaa:properties.description: References to other BackcastMilestone @ids that must complete first

oaa:properties.name: initiativeRefs
oaa:properties.description: References to okr:Initiative @ids driving this milestone

relationships.name: Conducted For Context
relationships.description: PESTEL analysis is conducted within an organization's context

relationships.name: Has PESTEL Factor
relationships.description: PESTEL analysis contains factors across six dimensions

relationships.name: Enriches Trend
relationships.description: PESTEL factor enriches an existing orgctx:Trend with structured scoring

relationships.name: Informs Vision
relationships.description: PESTEL analysis informs VSOM vision by surfacing macro forces that shape the future

relationships.name: Triggers Review
relationships.description: High-impact PESTEL factors trigger VSOM strategic review cycle

relationships.name: Feeds SWOT Factor
relationships.description: PESTEL factor provides evidence for SWOT external factors (Opportunities/Threats)

relationships.name: Stress Tests Strategy
relationships.description: Scenario set stress-tests VSOM strategies for robustness

relationships.name: Assesses Strategy In Scenario
relationships.description: Strategy assessment evaluates a VSOM strategy within a scenario

relationships.name: Shapes Vision
relationships.description: Futures funnel preferable layer shapes VSOM vision — the preferable future IS the strategic vision

relationships.name: Backcasts From Vision
relationships.description: Backcasting plan works backward from VSOM vision

relationships.name: Has Milestone
relationships.description: Backcasting plan contains milestones from future to present

relationships.name: Milestone Aligns To Objective
relationships.description: Backcast milestone aligns to a VSOM strategic objective

businessRules.name: PESTEL Must Cover All Six Dimensions
businessRules.action: THEN it MUST have at least one PESTELFactor in each of the six dimensions (Political, Economic, Social, Technological, Environmental, Legal)

businessRules.name: PESTEL Factor Should Enrich Existing Trend
businessRules.condition: IF a PESTELFactor overlaps with an existing orgctx:Trend
businessRules.action: THEN trendRef SHOULD reference the existing Trend @id to avoid duplication

businessRules.name: Critical PESTEL Factor Triggers Review
businessRules.condition: IF a PESTELFactor has impactLevel 'Critical' and timeToImpact 'Imminent' or 'NearTerm'
businessRules.action: THEN a vsom:StrategicReviewCycle SHOULD be triggered

businessRules.name: Scenario Set Must Have 3-5 Scenarios
businessRules.action: THEN it MUST contain between 3 and 5 Scenario instances

businessRules.name: Scenario Set Must Define Two Uncertainties
businessRules.action: THEN uncertaintyAxisX and uncertaintyAxisY MUST be specified

businessRules.name: Each Scenario Must Assess Strategy
businessRules.action: THEN each Scenario SHOULD have at least one ScenarioStrategyAssessment for each strategy being tested

businessRules.name: Scenario Probabilities Should Sum to ~1.0
businessRules.condition: IF Scenario.probability values are specified within a ScenarioSet
businessRules.action: THEN the sum of all scenario probabilities SHOULD approximately equal 1.0

businessRules.name: Futures Funnel Must Narrow
businessRules.action: THEN the count of items SHOULD decrease from possible to plausible to probable to preferable

businessRules.name: Backcasting Must Start From Vision
businessRules.action: THEN desiredFutureStateRef MUST reference a valid vsom:VisionComponent @id

businessRules.name: Backcasting Milestones Must Be Ordered
businessRules.action: THEN milestones MUST have sequenceOrder values forming a coherent reverse-chronological chain from targetYear to currentYear

businessRules.name: Milestone Dependencies Must Respect Order
businessRules.action: THEN referenced milestones MUST have earlier targetYear (closer to present)

businessRules.name: Near-Term Milestones Should Have Initiatives
businessRules.condition: IF a BackcastMilestone has targetYear within 2 years of currentYear
businessRules.action: THEN initiativeRefs SHOULD reference executable okr:Initiative @ids

changeControl.changeNotes: Initial release of MACRO-ONT as part of VE-Series VSOM-SA (Strategy Analysis). Provides PESTEL environmental scanning, Scenario Planning with strategy stress-testing, Futures Funnel (cone of plausibility), and Backcasting (reverse-engineering from vision). PESTEL enriches existing orgctx:Trend entities. Feeds into VSOM VisionComponent and INDUSTRY-ONT SWOT external factors. Cross-references VSOM-ONT v3.0.0, INDUSTRY-ONT v1.0.0, ORG-CONTEXT-ONT v3.0.0, OKR-ONT v2.0.0.
